# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.9-slim-buster

# Install required packages
RUN pip install gunicorn flask psycopg2-binary redis

# Copy application files
COPY . /app

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Define environment variables
ENV DATABASE_URL="postgresql://db:5432/app"
ENV REDIS_URL="redis://redis:6379"

# Run web server
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["gunicorn", "--workers", "4", "wsgi:app", "--bind", ":80"]

# Run API server
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["python", "api.py"]

# Run database
EXPOSE 5432
CMD ["postgres", "-c", "config_file=/app/database.conf"]

# Run Redis
EXPOSE 6379
CMD ["redis-server"]
